author: IGN YouTube
text:
THE END OF EVANGELION - Official 30th Anniversary Theatrical Trailer
The End of Evangelion from Hideaki ANNO return to theatres July 22 EVANGELION 30th Movie Fest. Check out the trailer for the theatrical event here!

This final movie version was created as an alternative ending to the NEON GENESIS EVANGELION TV series, remaking the final two episodes from the series. SEELE plans an attack on NERV after failing to create a man-made Third Impact. After reaffirming both her own and her mother’s existence in a state of despair, Asuka returns and begins the counterattack. However, new enemies descend from the heavens. Meanwhile, Shinji witnesses the horrifying wreckage of Asuka’s EVA-02 while piloting EVA-01. Mass production models surround EVA-01 and perform a solemn ceremony. What does it mean to complete a human heart?

#IGN #Anime

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Wet Hot American Summer - Official 25th Anniversary Release Official Trailer (2026)
Wetter. Hotter. American-er. Check out the Wet Hot American Summer 25th anniversary release trailer as the cult comedy film returns to theaters nationwide beginning August 14 with a limited engagement run through August 21, 2026. Wet Hot American Summer stars Paul Rudd, Amy Poehler, Bradley Cooper, Elizabeth Banks, Molly Shannon, Christopher Meloni, Michael Ian Black, Janeane Garofalo, David Hyde Pierce, Ken Marino, Joe Lo Truglio and Michael Showalter.

Wet Hot American Summer is directed by David Wain and co-written by David Wain and Michael Showalter.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
High on Life 2 - Official Accolades Trailer
Get another look at High on Life 2 in this trailer and see what critics are saying about the FPS sequel. In High on Life 2, an intergalactic conspiracy threatens the fate of humanity! Team up with a wide cast of talking alien guns as you shoot, stab, and skate your way through the exotic locales to take down the bad guys and save your favorite species (humans). High on Life 2 is available now on Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and PC. A demo is out now.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
How IGN Won a Team Fighting Game Tournament - Street Fighter 6 New Challengers
IGN's own Mitchell Saltzman was a participant in Capcom's Street Fighter 6 New Challengers Tournament, which featured a variety of content creators at various skill levels, who were all grouped up into four teams and paired with a pro Street Fighter 6 coach. The grand prize was $1,000 per player and a trip to CEO in Flordia in August, and our team won! Here's a video summarizing the event, going over the key factors that led to our win, and a look at some of the prep and training that went into it all.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Invincible: Superhero Roleplaying - Official Launch Trailer
Take a look at the Launch Trailer for Invincible: Superhero Roleplaying, an upcoming superhero tabletop roleplaying game based on the comic book Invincible by Robert Kirkman (The Walking Dead), Cory Walker, and Ryan Ottley, currently adapted as an animated series on Prime Video. Players will embody hit characters from the franchise in tabletop fashion to duke it out in strategy-based games. Invincible: Superhero Roleplaying is launching in July.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Tears of Metal - Official Early Access Release Date Teaser Trailer
Don't miss the Early Access Release Date Teaser Trailer for Tears of Metal, a medieval hack-and-slash action roguelike developed by Paper Cult. Players will advance to the front lines to aid the Scottish battalion and reclaim the island. Tears of Metal is launching into Early Access on July 22 for Xbox Cloud and PC (Steam and Xbox on PC).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Harvest Moon: The Winds of Anthos Complete - Official Trailer
Harvest Moon: The Winds of Anthos Complete Edition is available now on GOG and Epic Games Store. Watch the Harvest Moon: The Winds of Anthos Complete Edition trailer for this cozy farming adventure game. The Harvest Moon: The Winds of Anthos Complete Edition features the base game and all the DLC, including the Great Outdoors pack, Visitors from Afar pack, Tool upgrade & new Interior Designs pack, Animal Avalanche pack, and the New Crops, Fish, and Recipes pack.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Virtua Fighter Crossroads - Official Scenario Battle Overview Trailer
Get a deep dive into the scenario battles and combat of Virtua Fighter Crossroads in this latest trailer for the upcoming fighting game.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Mario 64's Bob-omb Battlefield Is Gaming's Most Important 3D Platforming Level - Art of the Level
Bob-omb Battlefield is a masterpiece within a masterpiece that established a new grammar for 3D movement and invoked a sense of storytelling within traditionally wordless worlds. The first level of Super Mario 64 is a dense possibility space with precisely-tailored progress that leads you across enemy lines and up a mountain in pursuit of its seven perfect stars. Bob-omb Battlefield is worth hanging on the wall.

What makes this warzone so welcoming? How many times can you climb the same hill? Do you think love can bloom, even on a battlefield? Light the fuses, man the artillery, and hold on to your flying hats, because this is The Art of the Level: Bob-omb Battlefield.

Presented by Marvel Animation's X-Men '97 Season 2.

#IGN #SuperMario64 #ArtOfTheLevel

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 8-Minute Gameplay Tour of Havana | IGN First
Join Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced lead level designer Jean Strachen as she takes you on an eight-minute gameplay tour of Havana. See what it looks like now in the gorgeous new remake that will be released for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X|S on July 9.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
ENDIX 2026 - Event Aftermovie
This is the aftermath. The best moments, the booths, the booth-floor chaos, all in one cut.

Thousands of gamers stepped into the free digital expo, explored booths built from real in-game assets, hung out with their favorite content creators and got the full event experience without a ticket, a flight, or a queue.

The next ENDIX lands Fall 2026. More booths, more games, more to explore.
